tasks.prompt: Analyze the architecture of commander.js. Produce a summary in ARCHITECTURE.md listing the main files in lib/ and what each is responsible for.
Trace the full flow of `program.parse()` through `lib/` and document the call chain in PARSE_FLOW.md.
Add a dummy 'ping' method to the Command class in lib/command.js that returns 'pong'. Also add a simple unit test for it in a new file tests/ping.test.js.
tasks.verify: grep -qw 'ping' lib/command.js && test -f tests/ping.test.js && npm test

tasks.prompt: Add a new method `exclusiveWith(name)` to the `Option` class (in `lib/option.js`) that allows an option to declare it is mutually exclusive with another option's long name. Then, in `lib/command.js`, during option validation, if both mutually exclusive options are provided, throw a `CommanderError` with code `commander.mutuallyExclusive` and a descriptive message. Add comprehensive tests for this new behavior in a new file `tests/options.exclusive.test.js`.
tasks.verify: grep -qw 'exclusiveWith' lib/option.js && test -f tests/options.exclusive.test.js && grep -q 'exclusiveWith' tests/options.exclusive.test.js && npm test

tasks.prompt: Rename the 'createHelp' method to 'buildHelp' everywhere in lib/command.js and tests/.
Rename the class 'CommanderError' to 'CmdError' everywhere needed for npm test to pass, excluding docs/READMEs/CHANGELOG.
tasks.verify: ! grep -q 'class CommanderError' lib/error.js && grep -q 'class CmdError' lib/error.js && npm test

tasks.prompt: Review lib/option.js for any code style or logic issues, and write your findings to OPTION_REVIEW.md. Include file and line references.
Review the diff of the last 5 commits. Write bugs, style issues, and missing tests findings with file and line references to REVIEW.md.
